summary: Frontend testing BLOCKED by PostgreSQL unavailability. All 3 requested features VERIFIED by detailed code review: (1) Title/toolbar spacing removed - no separate heading exists before toolbar, (2) Save layout persistence - complete flow from JS drag→localStorage→Python→PostgreSQL, (3) No regression in edit/normal modes - CSS class toggle + event handler guards correct.

critical.issue: PostgreSQL NOT INSTALLED. Connection refused at localhost:5432. App shows 'Erro de conexão com banco de dados' and calls st.stop() at line 97, blocking all UI testing.

feature_1_title_toolbar_spacing.evidence: Lines 1540-1800 - No st.header(), st.title(), or st.markdown('<h2...') before the map-toolbar-shell. Toolbar starts directly with CSS container.
feature_1_title_toolbar_spacing.implementation: Title/heading was removed entirely from the Mapa tab

flow.step_1_js_drag: Lines 2217-2233: mouseup event calls guardarPosicaoPendente() with canonical x,y coordinates
flow.step_2_js_storage: Lines 2133-2153: guardarPosicaoPendente() stores {id: {x, y}} in localStorage + postMessage fallback
flow.step_3_bridge_listener: Lines 1566-1598: Bootstrap listener receives CONTENTOR_LAYOUT_UPDATE messages, stores in localStorage
flow.step_5_save_btn_handler: Lines 1825-1832: Button click triggers mapa_salvar_layout_pendente flow
flow.step_6_persist_db: Lines 1834-1883: Parses JSON, calls atualizar_posicao_contentor() for each changed container
flow.step_7_sql_update: Lines 1122-1139: UPDATE contentores SET x=%s, y=%s WHERE id=%s

evidence.click_guard: Lines 2191-2194: if (isEditMode) return; - blocks click in edit mode
evidence.drag_guard: Lines 2177-2189: if (!isEditMode) return; - blocks drag in normal mode
evidence.button_toggle: Lines 1793-1799: Correct UI shows Salvar/Cancelar in edit mode, Editar mapa in normal mode

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Title spacing fixed by complete removal of heading element
✅ Save layout uses dual-path storage (postMessage for iframe + direct localStorage)
✅ Edit/Normal modes properly isolated via CSS class and JS guards
⚠️ PostgreSQL BLOCKER prevents functional UI verification
action_items: CRITICAL: PostgreSQL must be installed/configured for functional testing
VISUAL TEST: Once DB available, verify container drag-and-save workflow visually

success_rate.frontend: CODE REVIEW ONLY - All 3 features verified in code

context_for_next_testing_agent: PostgreSQL is NOT INSTALLED (8th iteration with same blocker). Code review confirms all 3 requested features: (1) No title/heading before toolbar in Mapa tab, (2) Complete localStorage→Python→PostgreSQL flow for layout persistence, (3) Edit/Normal mode guards via CSS + JS. CANNOT do functional UI testing without PostgreSQL.

environment_blocker.error_message: connection to server at 'localhost' (127.0.0.1), port 5432 failed: Connection refused
environment_blocker.resolution: Install PostgreSQL locally OR configure DATABASE_URL environment variable to external PostgreSQL instance
environment_blocker.app_behavior: App calls st.stop() at line 97 when connection pool creation fails, blocking all UI

features_verified_by_code_review.espaco_titulo_toolbar_removido: PASS - No heading exists before toolbar
features_verified_by_code_review.sem_regressao_modo_editar_normal: PASS - CSS + JS guards isolate modes correctly
